market_pulse: Weekend surge underway: OMNIA leads with Steve Aoki, LIV competing with Kehlani/Gorgon City, Hakkasan R&B positioning strong—multi-venue hip-hop/R&B vs. dance music split emerging.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Friday night full house (Kehlani at LIV)
Saturday: Major EDM talent across 3+ venues (Gorgon City, Steve Aoki, Alesso)
Sunday: R&B strategy active (Hakkasan R&Bae, Yoyo Lie at OMNIA)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Double down on Saturday house music hour; consider late-night R&B mixer for Sunday outreach to Hakkasan attendees.

content_gaps.description: R&B/hip-hop nights (especially Wednesday R&Bae) gaining 300K+ TT views; LIV silent on genre nights.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 'LIV Late R&B Lounge' Thursdays or R&B-friendly Friday afterparties; seed TikTok clips with @hiphop_vegas collabs.

content_gaps.description: Competitors running IG Stories/TT Lives during peak hours (9PM-midnight); LIV feed updates sporadic.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement daily Stories cadence: doors open 10min clip, 11PM crowd energy, 1AM peak moment, 3AM send-off.

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes prep/setup moments trending (Encore, Palm Tree showing setups); LIV rarely posts pre-party content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film DJ booth setup 4-5PM daily, sound check behind-scenes, staff readiness clips; post 30min before doors.
